AC: 6
STA: +10
WT: 0.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Dragonhide Belt
Lore Item
Slot: WAIST
AC: 6
STA: +10
WT: 0.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:4 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:90
Submitted By:Valandil Telperion
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-10-19 05:04:29
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 2,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 46
[Drops | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Demise of Blizzent

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kael Drakkel
NPC Name
Vorken Iceshard

The Western Wastes
NPC Name
Harla Dar

Zone Name
Kael Drakkel


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

Post Comment
Also Dropped in Kael
QuoteReply
# Mar 18 2002 at 7:07 AM Rating: Decent
Choadholio
49 posts
As said in other posts it does in fact drop in Kael as well.

The other night in the Quest House we got several of these along with a nice assortment of Plate Quest drops, no BP, but many other Plate items were dropped. Just thought I'd let everyone know. They didnt seem to drop off any certain mob as it appeared to be random off of most of the higher lvl Giants in that area
▲ Page top
this belt
QuoteReply
# Feb 12 2002 at 9:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770262183
2 posts
This is a pretty nice belt for a monk, granted it doesnt have str agi or haste, but its weightless and adds 10 sta. i really like it. I got mine off a merchant in the bazzar.. for 106 plat! lol.. anyways.. its pretty nice.

Also, why do people flame alot on here?

Mordaphin 'the mighty' Muldair
33 Paladin of Brell
Proud member of Voice of Rallos
Quellious server

RE: this belt
QuoteReply
# Oct 18 2002 at 11:37 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
/agree. Just got one tonight... finally got my stamina 100 without buffs, plus cut my weight down again! Plan to wear this until I can afford an FBSS.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 06 2002 at 11:50 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The other Shardwurms in GD drop a No Drop item called Shardwurm Fang on rare occations - did someone try to hand those to this guy ?
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 27 2001 at 11:15 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) STFU and post some GD helpfull info on this quest item. Everytime I wanna check an item for info some jerkoffs with no life gotta talk BS about who beats who. My dad could kick your dads ***, STFU, enough with the pissing contest and post some helpful info.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 01 2001 at 7:03 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) "STFU, enough with the pissing contest and post some helpful info."
RE: STFU
QuoteReply
# May 24 2001 at 8:46 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Your comment wasn't needed...if you wouldn'thave said anything...it would have stopped at his post. Everybody has to have the last word nowadays(i know i am, but im stateing a point).


You get this by turning in blliznet's tooth, lvl45 wurm in GD that sits in one of the corners walking around. When i saw him he would walk into the wall...get stuck and pop back down and do it over again. Was gonna attack but wasn't sure if he casted, and me being a lvl35 monk wouldn't have lasted long if he did. Oh...hes also red in color....hehe, and in con for me :)
The belt is worth 2k like it says....lots are saying 4k, but id rather get a TBB for 3 and save 1k. This owuld be nice on my monk,but i just got my fbss and am not oging to worry with this anymore. Also, Blizz isn't ever camped so it wouldn't be tough to get him, and i heard rumors of him dropping a whip that druids can use.
▲ Page top
RE: STFU
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2001 at 4:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762454703
1 post
The whip that you are referring to is from the other named wurm Vludeen. The whip is called Vludeen's Tail, and for the difficulty involved in getting it, it's not a bad weapon. Some nice stats and it's quick.

The girls like the looks of it too. 8o)

Gulasx Uthayoni
60 Hierophant of the Vagrants
Tribunal
▲ Page top
RE: STFU
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2002 at 1:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765785965
View User Forum
59 posts
Vluudeen's Tail is a great whip for druids who want to practice their 1hs. 0.0 wt on the whip, decent stats as well.

Vluudeen's Tail is also a quest item that can be turned in for the Bow of the Huntsman 20 30 180 with a 80 dd proc.

# Apr 19 2001 at 5:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248061882
4 posts
A giant, or giants in Kael also drop this belt. I got one a while back, while killing them for faction.
▲ Page top
Not Pathetic
QuoteReply
# Mar 23 2001 at 10:36 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592245575093
16 posts
While I'm sure there are nicer items for the waist, this is certainly NOT pathetic. At least not from a monk's perspective. My Iksar monk was born with 80 stamina. In case you didn't know, if you have less than 100 stamina, you will lose stats and slow down when fatigued (i.e. your stamina bar is empty). With 100+ stamina you don't lose stats or slow down when fatigued.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 20 2001 at 3:19 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Pathetic excuse for an item.

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 27 2001 at 2:27 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) No, never played an useless class like monk. I hate monks. That's one class that should have been left out of the game.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 28 2001 at 2:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) HA HA HA You speak like that cz u problably was beaten for a monk weaker than you. If you think monks should have been removed, ok I respect your opnion, but let know that a monk well armored and with a good 2h stick can beat ANY warrior with breast plates, iron gauntlets and whatever else. I am not a monk but I am know that they are a class that hit and they hit hard.
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 18 2001 at 1:32 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I beat a 49 monk with my 45 tank....and it was a iksar monk tough tough fight. but I wont play a monk sorry. Not enough ac and hp for my taste. but that's just me.
